title: Connect a task/item to several boards/group
excerpt:
Lets say I want to connect task/item “meet HR” to several boards like “HR” and “Meeting”. 
How can I do this?

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Lets say I want to connect task/item “meet HR” to several boards like “HR” and “Meeting”.
How can I do this?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
there is a paid external app called “Same Item Multiple Boards” It looks class as all subitems and comments sync across all boards.

image634×377 17.2 KB

Also following incase others know of a free way
